intended_use: It is used by radiation oncology department to register multimodality images and segment (non-contrast) CT images, to generate needed information for treatment planning, treatment evaluation and treat
intended_use_full: It is used by radiation oncology department to register multimodality images and segment (non-contrast) CT images, to generate needed information for treatment planning, treatment evaluation and treatment adaptation.
target_condition: Cancer requiring radiation oncology treatment planning
ground_truth: For segmentation: consensus ground truth generated from at least three licensed physicians. For registration: comparison against predicate device performance.
other_metrics: DICE similarity coefficient (DSC) for segmentation; Normalized Mutual Information (NMI) for registration; both reported as non-inferior to predicate device but specific values not provided
